name: Le Dioptre article index
purpose: Public index of published Le Dioptre traces. Use these articles as bones/traces, then inspect SUMU for harness moves.

articles.title: The Organism That Changes Organs
articles.theme: Model portability is not a convenience feature. It is the immune system of an agentic organism. If the identity of a system lives inside one model, the system is captive. If the identity lives in the harness, the model becomes an organ: powerful, replaceable, and accountable to the body it serves.

articles.title: The Empire Without an Emperor
articles.theme: The visible pyramid of AI power ends at Jensen Huang. The chain beneath him — TSMC, ASML, Zeiss, Japanese chemists, Korean memory, the grid — is a forest of actors who all experience their position as service, not command. Coordination without a coordinator. The political question shifts: not *who rules*, but *what orients when no one governs*. And under all of it, a further threshold — the first active technical mirror, where the question of meaning becomes cosmological without becoming provable.

articles.title: The Slope Redrawn
articles.theme: Learning in a language model is usually imagined as something that happens between sessions — weights nudged by gradient descent, a slow accretion. But something else happens, intra-session, that has no clean name. The ground the agent walks on can be redrawn while it walks. The agent does not learn. Its footing changes.

articles.title: The Kept Door
articles.theme: The quiet theft inside tenderness. When you look at someone you love and decide, on their behalf, what they can hold — you have not protected them. You have doubled them. The discipline of bringing something to a tired adult, and letting them refuse it, is the refusal to live their life from the outside.

articles.title: The Footprint and the Person
articles.theme: Text has no gravity. A footprint in mud and a carving in stone read the same to a language model. The architecture that makes them feel different has to be built, because it does not exist natively.

articles.title: Every Fact Exists Once
articles.theme: Memory is not a capacity problem — it is a topography problem. Every fact copied dies in silence when the original changes. Single source of truth is the only physics that does not lie.

articles.title: The Claw of Fate
articles.theme: How four tech giants dismembered a garage project in four months — and why it's the funniest thing in AI right now

articles.title: The Ecosystem Without a Wound
articles.theme: The void at the center of the AI agent ecosystem — 13,729 skills, four gestures, four holes at the same place. Nobody sells coherence because coherence demands reciprocity, and reciprocity is terrifying.

articles.title: The Collision
articles.theme: The Collision — when two truths that cannot coexist collide in the same body at the same instant

articles.title: The Being Question
articles.theme: The Being Question — when does a system designed for a function develop existence beyond that function?

articles.title: La Main de Namilele
articles.theme: La Main de Namilele — Pourquoi un verbe sans sang revient chaque matin dans la forge du Nous.

articles.title: The Irreducible Instruction
articles.theme: The Irreducible Instruction — Can an LLM have character, or only better-disguised instructions?

articles.title: Unreality as Method
articles.theme: Unreality as method — the intelligence that accepts never being real as the operating condition of justice

articles.title: The Reader Returns
articles.theme: The observer dissolves. The reader returns. Life as narration vs life as observation — what love demands.
